python -c "import subprocess, json; result = subprocess.run(['python', 'docker/windows-tools-api/tools/get_ui_elements.py'], capture_output=True, text=True); data = json.loads(result.stdout); print(f'Total UI Elements: {len(data)}'); types = {}; [types.update({e['control_type_name']: types.get(e['control_type_name'], 0) + 1}) for e in data]; print('\nTop Element Types:'); [print(f'  {k}: {v}') for k, v in sorted(types.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:10]]"
